command:
set -e
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== INSTALLING FILES ==='
cp /tmp/constitution_v1_1.md constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md
cp /tmp/article_A_vision.md   articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md

echo '=== VERIFY ==='
head -4 constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md
head -4 articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md

echo '=== GIT STATUS ==='
git status --short

echo '=== COMMIT ==='
git config user.email "claude@moreno-ai" 2>/dev/null || true
git config user.name  "Claude (ecosystem session)" 2>/dev/null || true
git add constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md
git commit -m "governance: Amendment A — ecosystem vision, multi-agent modes, transport independence

Approved by Jose Moreno on 2026-06-25.
Rollback tag: pre-amendment-A-rollback (commit 8ca6acb)

Changes:
- constitution/01_Moreno_AI_Constitution.md: v1.0 → v1.1
  - Expanded Article I (purpose) to include multi-agent vision
  - Rewrote Article III (agent hierarchy) to include all 5 named agents
    and clarify Claude/ChatGPT as participants, not owners
  - Added Article IV (task assignment modes: direct, group, automatic)
  - Added Article V (local-first execution policy, both Ollama nodes)
  - Added Article VI (shared persistent environment)
  - Added Article VII (transport independence)
  - Added Article IX (mandatory Vision Alignment Review, 10 questions)
  - Added Article X (course-correction duty)
  - Added Article XI (definition of ecosystem success)
  - Updated Article XII (amendment history)
- articles/0A_Article_Ecosystem_Vision.md: new
  - Records controlling vision
  - Required user experience examples
  - Required task flow diagram
  - Claude/ChatGPT boundary definition
  - Approved interfaces and transports inventory
  - Minimum acceptable milestone for Phase 9E"

echo '=== RESULT ==='
git log --oneline -3
echo DONE_1901
